name: Meilisearch
description: Lightning-fast, ultra-relevant, and typo-tolerant search engine with an intuitive built-in web UI.

variables.label: Meilisearch Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the Meilisearch API and Web UI.

variables.label: Master Key
variables.description: API key required to interact with the Meilisearch instance (must be at least 16 bytes).

variables.label: Environment
variables.description: Environment mode. 'development' enables the built-in search preview web interface.

variables.label: Disable Analytics
variables.description: Set to true to disable telemetry and analytics sent to Meilisearch.
